title: viola × wilhelmii
intro: Viola × wilhelmii, also known as the Wilhelm's pansy or hybrid pansy, is a type of flowering plant that is a hybrid between Viola sororia and Viola × wittrockiana. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × wilhelmii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Viola × wilhelmii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
